'''kadhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zacaton|zacaton]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zacaton|zacaton]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kadhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædhimith|kædhimith]] || [[word:kædhimij|kædhimij]] || [[word:kædhimish|kædhimish]] || [[word:kædhimi|kædhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhudhumuth|kadhudhumuth]] || [[word:kadhudhumuj|kadhudhumuj]] || [[word:kadhudhumush|kadhudhumush]] || [[word:kadhudhumu|kadhudhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhumuth|kadhumuth]] || [[word:kadhumuj|kadhumuj]] || [[word:kadhumush|kadhumush]] || [[word:kadhumu|kadhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhufmufth|kadhufmufth]] || [[word:kadhufmufj|kadhufmufj]] || [[word:kadhufmufsh|kadhufmufsh]] || [[word:kadhufmuf|kadhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhumuthu|kadhumuthu]] || [[word:kadhumuju|kadhumuju]] || [[word:kadhumushu|kadhumushu]] || [[word:kadhumuku|kadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhumuth|kadhumuth]] || [[word:kadhumuj|kadhumuj]] || [[word:kadhumush|kadhumush]] || [[word:kadhumu|kadhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhumuthul|kadhumuthul]] || [[word:kadhumujul|kadhumujul]] || [[word:kadhumushul|kadhumushul]] || [[word:kadhumukul|kadhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhumuuthuthu|kadhumuuthuthu]] || [[word:kadhumuujuju|kadhumuujuju]] || [[word:kadhumuushushu|kadhumuushushu]] || [[word:kadhumuuku|kadhumuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhumuthun|kadhumuthun]] || [[word:kadhumujun|kadhumujun]] || [[word:kadhumushun|kadhumushun]] || [[word:kadhumukun|kadhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhumuthuoro|kadhumuthuoro]] || [[word:kadhumujuoro|kadhumujuoro]] || [[word:kadhumushuoro|kadhumushuoro]] || [[word:kadhumukuoro|kadhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
